hero.title: Ukungafihlisi
hero.lead: I-IATF isebenza esidlangalaleni ngokuzenzekelayo. Izigqibo zeprojekthi, utshintsho lwekhowudi, iinguqu zolawulo, kunye neendleko zokusebenza zibhalwa kwiindawo zikawonkewonke. Eli phepha lidwelisa apho luhlobo ngalunye lwerekhodi luhlala khona kunye nendlela yokuyifunda.

items: Izigqibo zeprojekthi. Izigqibo zokwamkelwa, ukugcinwa kweencwadi ezigciniweyo, kunye nokutshintshwa kwezigqibo zibhalwa njengemiba okanye ukukhutshwa kwindawo yokugcina efanelekileyo, kwaye zishwankathelwe kwirejista yoluntu. irekhodi- Kulungile .

Cela iirekhodi. Iirekhodi zezicelo zikawonke-wonke zigcinwa kumbutho we-IATF GitHub, kule webhusayithi, okanye kuzo zombini. Iirekodi zinokushwankathela, zilungise, okanye zihlengahlengise isicelo sokuqala ukuze imfuno yokufikeleleka iphinde ihlolwe ngaphandle kokubhenca ulwazi lomntu olungafunekiyo. Izigqibo zokungavisisani zishwankathelwa kwirekhodi kawonkewonke xa zichaphazela iprojekthi okanye isigqibo solawulo. Iingxelo zezicelo azibandakanywa kwisalathiso senjini yokukhangela apho kunokwenzeka khona. Jonga iingxelo: isicelo sokuqala sokupapashwa silindile.
Ukutshintsha kwekhowudi. Lonke utshintsho lwekhowudi kukuzibophelela esidlangalaleni kwindawo yokugcina efanelekileyo. Jonga i-IATF Umbutho weGitHub- Kulungile .
Utshintsho kulawulo. Ukuhlaziywa kwiphepha lolawulo kulandelwa njengokuzibophelela iiwebhsayithi ze-iatf Iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano ukuzibophelela kwimbali kwiGitHub.

Iindleko zokusebenza. I-IATF igcina iindleko zokusebenza ziphantsi kwaye irekhoda iindleko zeziseko zophuhliso zikarhulumente eziphindaphindiweyo. Ukusukela ngo-2022, ezona ndleko ziphindaphindiweyo ziye zaba ngamagama e-domain. Ukusingathwa kusetyenzisiwe amaziko asimahla okanye iindleko ezisezantsi apho kunokwenzeka. Jonga irekhodi leendleko ezisebenzayo apha ngezantsi.

Amanqaku okudibanisa. Amanqaku avela kulo naluphi na uphononongo olulungelelanisiweyo okanye isigqibo esiphilayo kwiGitHub Iingxoxo kwindawo yokugcina efanelekileyo jonga Iingxoxo kwi- iiwebhsayithi ze-iatf indawo yokugcina izinto.

paragraphs: I-IATF igcina iziseko zayo zoluntu zincinci. Ukusukela ngo-2022, iindleko eziphambili zokusebenza eziphindaphindiweyo ziye zaba ngamagama e-domain. Ukusingathwa kusebenzise iziseko ezisemgangathweni zasimahla okanye zexabiso eliphantsi apho kunokwenzeka.
Le rekhodi ayisiyo ingxelo yezimali ehlaziyiweyo. Yincwadi yoluntu yeendleko zokusebenza kweziseko zophuhliso ezisetyenziselwa ukugcina i-IATF ikwi-intanethi.
operatingCosts.footnote: Iirisithi zingabhekiswa okanye zipapashwe emva kokulungiswa. Iidilesi zobuqu, iinkcukacha zokuhlawula, kunye nolwazi lweakhawunti olungeyomfuneko aziyonxalenye yerekhodi loluntu.

items.label: Amanqaku
items.value: Iindleko ze-domain ezixhaswe ngemali yi-mugiwarafx. Ukusingatha kusetyenziswa i-free-tier okanye i-infrastructure yexabiso eliphantsi nge-Cloudflare. IATF.CC ulawulo.

items.label: Amanqaku
items.value: Iindleko ze-domain ezixhaswa ngemali yi-mugiwarafx. Ukusingathwa kusetyenziswe i-free-tier okanye i-infrastructure yexabiso eliphantsi nge-Vercel.

paragraphs: Amanye amaxwebhu agcinwa ngaphandle kweerekhodi zoluntu ngenjongo:
items: Incwadana yabucala esetyenziswa kuphela ukucacisa isicelo phambi kokuba samkelwe, sikhatyiwe, okanye sishwankathelwe.
Iidilesi zangasese, iinombolo zefowuni, neenkcukacha zobuqu ezingeyomfuneko.
Nantoni na enokuchonga umsebenzisi ngamnye wetekhnoloji yokuncedisa ngaphandle kwemvume.
Iincoko ze-Raw Discord, ngaphandle kokuba umyalezo othile ususwa ngabom kwingxelo yeprojekthi kawonkewonke.

header.title: Ulawulo luyincwadi yemithetho engasemva kwezi rekhodi

paragraphs: Ukuba ufuna ukuqonda ukuba iiprojekthi zamkelwe njani, zigcinwe njani okanye zabelwe njani ngokutsha, funda iphepha lolawulo.
